title: Login
description: First steps in the digital world. Everything renders slightly late.

steps.text: The horizon loaded last. The party pretended not to notice.

lines.speaker: Mage
lines.text: Don't look at the mountains too fast. They need a moment.

lines.speaker: Rogue
lines.text: I moved before the world was ready for me. It CORRECTED me. Politely.

lines.speaker: Fighter
lines.text: My sword casts two shadows. One of them is a frame behind.

lines.speaker: Cleric
lines.text: When I pray here, something answers 200 OK. I have decided to find that comforting.

lines.speaker: Bard
lines.text: The birdsong loops every eleven seconds. I checked. It's a good loop. Whoever wrote it got PAID.
